title: Deriving Instances
learning_objective: Add a deriving clause so a custom type supports equality, ordering, showing, and enumeration.
hints: See the "Derived instances" section of LYAH — Making Our Own Types and Typeclasses.
Add a deriving clause to the data declaration to get standard instances for free.
You'll need Eq, Ord, Show, Enum, and Bounded for the tests to pass.
